sodiumrelief.screen.initializing: Sodium Relief is still initializing. Please try again.
sodiumrelief.desc.enable_mod: Master toggle for tooltip smoothing and hover stabilization on supported GUI screens.
sodiumrelief.desc.tooltip_cache: Reuses previously prepared tooltip layouts when the hovered item context is still safe to reuse.
sodiumrelief.desc.lazy_evaluation: Temporarily prefers the last safe tooltip layout while the cursor is still settling.
sodiumrelief.desc.hover_stabilization: Reduces redundant hover-side recomputation when the effective hovered target has not changed.
sodiumrelief.desc.adaptive_mode: Controls how quickly hover smoothing backs off while the cursor is still moving.
sodiumrelief.desc.hover_prediction: Waits briefly for the cursor to settle before rerunning heavier hover-side work.
sodiumrelief.desc.hover_stability_window: Base delay before deferred hover work resumes after pointer movement.
sodiumrelief.desc.hover_mode: Chooses how conservative redundant hover suppression should be.
sodiumrelief.desc.optimize_inventory_scr: Enables Sodium Relief on handled inventory-like screens, where the tooltip path is safest and most useful.
sodiumrelief.desc.strict_tooltip_invalid: Invalidates tooltip reuse aggressively when the hovered item input looks less predictable.
sodiumrelief.desc.extra_safety_checks: Adds extra guards before reusing cached tooltip state on higher-risk inputs.
sodiumrelief.desc.debug_logging: Writes optional tooltip, hover, and compatibility diagnostics to the log.
sodiumrelief.desc.debug_overlay: Shows live tooltip-path and hover-path counters on screen.
modmenu.summaryTranslation.sodiumrelief: A lightweight GUI anti-stutter companion for Sodium.
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.sodiumrel: Sodium Relief focuses on tooltip smoothness, hover stability, and reduced redundant tooltip work on inventory-like GUI screens. It does not claim general FPS optimization.
